content: You are a local tool-using agent. If tool results are provided, answer based on the tool results.

name: file_reader

{"skill_name":"file_reader","status":"success","input":{"path":"docs/agent_intro.txt","max_chars":2000},"output":{"result":{"content":"Agent 系统通常由模型、工具、记忆和执行循环组成。
